text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: This can't be real. How could I let this happen?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I told myself I'd catch up to Prez! I was supposed
to... to...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
How am I supposed to call myself invincible after
this?
choice_data_list: Try to calm down a little, okay?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yeah, you're right. My story isn't over...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: In fact, it's just getting started!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So I need you to keep training me! Train me so
much that I won't lose to anyone... ever again!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
choice_data_list: Prove that the great Teio will never lose again.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I... won't lose again. I won't let anyone ever pass
me again.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'll prove that I really am invincible!
